source.name: Litzas printed menu
source.note: Authoritative source: scanned in-store menu dated 2026-03-15.

note: Pizzas are handmade with a medium-thick crust and Litzas traditional pizza sauce unless noted. Half-and-half pizzas are priced by the higher-priced half. Gluten-free crust is available in medium only.

items.name: Cheese
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Garlic Cheese
items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Pepperoni
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, and pepperoni.

items.name: Ground Sausage
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, and ground Italian sausage.

items.name: Western BBQ
items.ingredients: BBQ sauce, mozzarella cheese, and grilled chicken.

items.name: Ham
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, and ham.

items.name: Canadian
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, and Canadian bacon.

items.name: Hawaiian
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, ham, and pineapple.

items.name: Red & Black
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, and black olives.

items.name: Red & Green
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, and jalapenos.

items.name: Red, Green & Yellow
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, jalapenos, and pineapple.

items.name: Italian Carbonara
items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce, mozzarella cheese, chicken, bacon, and sliced tomatoes.

items.name: Lone Peak
items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce, mozzarella cheese, and chicken.

items.name: Mt Olympus
items.ingredients: Honey mustard sauce, mozzarella cheese, chicken, bacon, and BBQ sauce drizzle.

items.name: Twin Peaks
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, and mushrooms.

items.name: Kings Peak
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, black olives, and mushrooms.

items.name: Little Litzas
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, and ground Italian sausage.

items.name: Classic Litzas
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, ground Italian sausage, and mushrooms.

items.name: Litzas Meatza
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, pepperoni, ham, and ground Italian sausage.

items.name: Spinach Artichoke
items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce, mozzarella cheese, spinach, artichoke, and feta cheese.

items.name: Five Cheese
items.ingredients: Garlic butter sauce, mozzarella, cheddar and Monterey Jack blend, parmesan, and feta.

items.name: Vegetarian
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, mushrooms, black olives, green peppers, onions, and sliced tomatoes or pineapple.

items.name: Traditional
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, mushrooms, black olives, green peppers, onions, and your choice of one meat.

items.name: Deluxe
items.ingredients: Pizza sauce, mozzarella cheese, mushrooms, black olives, green peppers, onions, and your choice of three meats.

items.name: Gluten-Free Crust
items.description: Available in medium only.

items.name: Garden Salad
items.description: Crisp iceberg and red leaf lettuce, purple cabbage, ripe tomatoes, red beets, home-style croutons, and your choice of dressing.

items.name: Chef Salad
items.description: A garden salad plus black olives, Monterey Jack and cheddar cheeses, Danish ham, and roasted turkey.

items.name: Garlic Bread
items.description: Thick toasted bread brushed with house garlic butter.

items.name: Cheese Garlic Bread
items.description: Garlic bread topped with melted mozzarella.

items.name: Extra Dressing
items.description: Ranch, Roquefort, Thousand Island, French, Italian, Honey Mustard, and Fat-Free Vinaigrette.

items.name: Spaghetti Lunch
items.description: Served with a small salad, a slice of garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Mini One-Item Pizza Lunch
items.description: Served with a small salad, a slice of garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Lasagna Lunch
items.description: Served with a small salad, a slice of garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Garden Salad Meal for One
items.description: Medium garden salad, a slice of garlic bread, and a medium drink.

items.name: Pizza Meal for One
items.description: Mini two-item pizza, a medium salad, a slice of garlic bread, and a medium drink. Make it a small two-item pizza for $3.50 more.

items.name: Pizza Meal for Two
items.description: Small two-item pizza, two medium salads, two slices of garlic bread, and two medium drinks. Make it a medium two-item pizza for $3.50 more.

items.name: Meal for More
items.description: Large two-item pizza, a large family salad, four slices of garlic bread, and a pitcher of soda (non-refillable).

items.name: Spaghetti
items.description: Traditional noodles with Litzas spaghetti sauce, made with pork.

items.name: Kid Kaper Meal
items.description: Kid-size spaghetti with a slice of garlic bread and a kids beverage.

items.name: Lasagna
items.description: Layered with Litzas ricotta and mozzarella blend, spaghetti sauce, and ground beef.

items.name: Calzone
items.description: A turnover with pizza sauce, mozzarella, ricotta, and your choice of three toppings (excludes seasoned ground beef).

items.name: Fountain Drinks
items.description: Root beer, diet root beer, apple beer, Coke, Diet Coke, Coke Zero, caffeine-free Diet Coke, Dr. Pepper, Diet Dr. Pepper, Sprite, fruit punch, lemonade, or iced tea.

items.name: Add a Flavor
items.description: Lemon, lime, cherry, vanilla, or chocolate added to any drink at no extra charge.

items.name: Specialty Drinks
items.description: Limeade and cherry limeade (non-refillable).

items.name: Take-Home Salad Dressing
items.description: By the pint.

items.name: Take-Home Spaghetti Sauce
items.description: By the pint.
